topics.title: Windows PowerShell 5.1 Compatibility
key_warnings: Do not use PowerShell 7-only syntax (ternary, ??, ??=, ?., &&/||, ForEach-Object -Parallel, Join-String)
Validate with powershell.exe when targeting Windows PowerShell 5.1
Do not rely on pwsh being installed
Grouping parentheses reset $? in 5.1
topics.summary: Windows PowerShell 5.1 Compatibility — applies to PowerShell scripts, repo setup scripts, generated scripts.

topics.title: Quoting and Native Commands
key_warnings: Use the call operator for quoted executable paths
A quoted command-line string is not a command plus arguments
Check LASTEXITCODE immediately after native tools
stderr does not always mean failure
topics.summary: Quoting and Native Commands — applies to native executable invocation, quoted tool paths, argument arrays.

topics.title: Arrays, Hashtables, and Functions
key_warnings: PowerShell pipelines enumerate arrays
+= copies the whole array each time
Use the -join operator instead of Join-String
Comparison operators filter arrays - put $null on the left
Use ordered hashtables when output order matters
topics.summary: Arrays, Hashtables, and Functions — applies to PowerShell functions, script data structures, report object construction.

topics.title: Errors, Exit Codes, and Logging
key_warnings: try/catch catches terminating errors only - use ErrorAction Stop
PowerShell errors and native exit codes are separate systems
Do not treat all stderr as failure
End with a deterministic status line
topics.summary: Errors, Exit Codes, and Logging — applies to error handling, task logs, native process validation.

topics.title: Files, Paths, and Encoding
key_warnings: Use LiteralPath for literal paths
Windows PowerShell 5.1 -Encoding UTF8 writes a BOM
Always pass -Encoding explicitly
Keep artifact roots short
Do not put task artifacts inside .agents skills
topics.summary: Files, Paths, and Encoding — applies to file writes, path handling, long paths.

topics.title: Visual Studio Developer Shell
key_warnings: Verify environment variables after loading
Check VSCMD_VER to detect an initialized shell
Do not assume vswhere is on PATH - use the Installer folder
Do not mix Visual Studio versions in one window
Distinguish PowerShell process updates from child cmd environments
topics.summary: Visual Studio Developer Shell — applies to Visual Studio Developer PowerShell, Developer Command Prompt, vswhere discovery.

topics.title: MSBuild and MSVC Build Tools
key_warnings: Run from a verified developer environment loaded once at the top
Pass explicit Configuration and Platform
Quote semicolon lists when calling MSBuild from PowerShell
Trust exit codes over partial output files
topics.summary: MSBuild and MSVC Build Tools — applies to MSBuild, MSVC, cl.exe.

topics.title: Embedded Python in PowerShell
key_warnings: Avoid accidental PowerShell interpolation - single-quoted line arrays
Inject values via argv, env, or JSON files, never string interpolation
Validate with py_compile before running
Account for the 5.1 BOM with utf-8-sig readers
topics.summary: Embedded Python in PowerShell — applies to generated Python, PowerShell line arrays, cross-language scripts.

topics.title: Validation and AST Checks
key_warnings: Use the Windows PowerShell parser under powershell.exe for PS5.1 scripts
Parse generated JSON and JSONL line by line
Validate metadata cross-references
Do not run Git checks unless explicitly requested
topics.summary: Validation and AST Checks — applies to syntax checks, JSON validation, JSONL validation.

topics.title: VS Code Repository Agent Patterns
key_warnings: Read repo-local instructions first
Keep task artifacts out of skill folders
Use placeholders in reusable docs
Update topics.json and corpus.jsonl when guidance materially changes
topics.summary: VS Code Repository Agent Patterns — applies to agent task setup, repo convention detection, artifact routing.

topics.title: PowerShell 5.1 Pitfalls Checklist
key_warnings: Check for PS7-only syntax
Check native command quoting and exit codes
Check Developer Shell verification
Check artifact routing and encoding
No Git unless requested
topics.summary: PowerShell 5.1 Pitfalls Checklist — applies to preflight reviews, script edits, generated script validation.
